name: Gift Tax Exclusion for Loans of Art

eligibility.description: The loan must be to a public charity or private operating foundation and the use must be related to the organization's exempt purpose.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The loan of a qualified work of art to a 501(c)(3) organization (other than a private foundation) is not treated as a taxable transfer for gift tax purposes.
